title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.775 - Judgment final — appeal not to affect
text:
511.775.  Judgment final — appeal not to affect. — Sections 511.770 to 511.787 apply to any foreign country judgment that is final and conclusive and enforceable where rendered even though an appeal therefrom is pending or it is subject to appeal.
(L. 1984 H.B. 957 § 2)
